summary: Demand evidence agents completed and PRD readiness passed.

demand_status.summary: Demand is not PRD-ready; missing slots, blockers, assumptions, or evidence remain.

triage.explanation: Fast route by default; no hard factual risk trigger was found.

problem: Existing YOLO demand evidence dispatch must handle minor Claude JSON key drift and fail closed with explicit blockers on invalid agent JSON.
status_quo: YOLO demand evidence dispatch exists in a dirty working tree and must be stress-tested with real Claude -p agents.
desired_outcome: Minor recoverable JSON drift is recorded, unrecoverable JSON receives EVIDENCE_AGENT_INVALID_JSON, and PRD readiness stays blocked.
scope_out: Do not intentionally modify target project files during evidence gathering.
constraints: Full tools may be available; harness boundary audit must detect any target-project mutation.
acceptance_criteria: Minor recoverable JSON drift is recorded, unrecoverable JSON receives EVIDENCE_AGENT_INVALID_JSON, and PRD readiness stays blocked.
risks: Malformed provider output could be silently accepted or produce unclear blockers that hide readiness failure.

explorer must complete with evidence and a result before cross_check PRD readiness.

protocol.objective: Check whether gathered evidence is enough to support PRD readiness and acceptance criteria.
protocol.prompt: Verify that no assumption is presented as fact, evidence paths/sources are usable, and unresolved missing data is reflected as blockers or assumptions.

agent_results.claim: Evidence dispatch already implements JSON repair for drift and explicit EVIDENCE_AGENT_INVALID_JSON blocking for unrecoverable JSON, with PRD readiness integration.

evidence.summary: parseJsonCandidate attempts direct JSON.parse, then applies repair patterns: line range unquoting, backslash escapes, empty key deduplication, trailing comma removal. Returns {parsed, repaired: boolean, error}.
evidence.why: Implements minor recoverable JSON drift handling with repair detection.

evidence.summary: extractJsonObject handles empty, direct parse, markdown code blocks, and slice from first { to last }. Returns parse result with error aggregation.
evidence.why: Multi-strategy JSON extraction handles Claude provider output variations.

evidence.summary: normalizeAgentResult returns explicit error codes EVIDENCE_AGENT_INVALID_JSON (parsed null) or EVIDENCE_AGENT_PROVIDER_FAILED (provider run failed). Error recorded in result.error_code and missing array.
evidence.why: Unrecoverable JSON fails closed with explicit blocker code.

evidence.summary: Runtime extracts JSON from provider stdout via extractJsonObject and normalizes via normalizeAgentResult. Repaired flag tracked in provider_runs.
evidence.why: JSON repair and error handling integrated into runtime execution flow.

evidence.summary: Agent results feed into inspectDemandPrdReadiness. Boundary violations add BOUNDARY_PROJECT_MUTATION blockers. Final readiness.prd_ready controls result status/code/summary.
evidence.why: PRD readiness blocked when agent results have errors or boundary violations.

evidence.summary: repairs minor Claude JSON key drift test passes output with line: 42-88, backslash-escaped strings, and empty key duplicates. Verifies json_repaired flag recorded and status pass.
evidence.why: Test proves minor recoverable drift is recorded and does not block.

evidence.summary: invalid agent JSON fails closed test returns stdout not json. Asserts status blocked, result.error_code EVIDENCE_AGENT_INVALID_JSON, and readiness blocker code EVIDENCE_AGENT_INVALID_JSON.
evidence.why: Test proves unrecoverable JSON receives explicit error code and blocks PRD readiness.

evidence.summary: agent evidence without explicit scope blocked test removes scope field from evidence. Asserts status blocked, result.error_code EVIDENCE_SCOPE_REQUIRED, and readiness blocker.
evidence.why: Additional validation: malformed agent results produce explicit blocker codes.

evidence.summary: agent conflict remains readiness blocker test has cross-checker return block with conflicting evidence. Asserts readiness.prd_ready false and blocker code EVIDENCE_AGENT_CONFLICT.
evidence.why: Readiness integration verified: agent blockers propagate to PRD readiness.

risks: If JSON repair patterns are insufficient for real Claude drift, agents may be incorrectly blocked.
If explicit error codes change, PRD readiness checks may fail to recognize blockers.

result.notes: All claimed functionality exists and is tested. No missing data identified. Verifier should confirm error code integration with readiness and ensure test coverage is complete for real-world Claude drift patterns.

agent_results.claim: Explorer evidence is verified: all facts have project-scoped sources with exact paths, no assumptions presented as facts, and no unresolved missing data. The claim that evidence dispatch implements JSON repair with explicit error blocking and PRD readiness integration is correct.

evidence.summary: parseJsonCandidate implements JSON repair with tracked repaired flag
evidence.why: Verifies explorer fact 1: minor recoverable JSON drift is handled

evidence.summary: Test confirms JSON repair records json_repaired flag and passes status
evidence.why: Verifies explorer test evidence: repair behavior is validated

evidence.summary: normalizeAgentResult returns explicit EVIDENCE_AGENT_INVALID_JSON error code
evidence.why: Verifies explorer fact 3: unrecoverable JSON fails closed

evidence.summary: Test asserts status blocked and error_code EVIDENCE_AGENT_INVALID_JSON
evidence.why: Verifies explorer test evidence: blocking behavior validated

evidence.summary: Agent errors feed into inspectDemandPrdReadiness and set prd_ready false
evidence.why: Verifies explorer fact 5: PRD readiness integration exists

evidence.summary: Test verifies agent conflicts cause prd_ready false and blocker code
evidence.why: Verifies explorer test evidence: readiness propagation validated

risks: JSON repair patterns in parseJsonCandidate may not cover all real-world Claude drift variations
Test coverage may not reflect actual agent output patterns in production

result.notes: All 10 explorer evidence records verified against actual code and tests. No assumptions promoted to facts. All evidence paths exist and are usable. PRD readiness criteria met: project has JSON repair implementation, explicit error blocking, integration tests, and readiness gate. Cross_check not required.
